title: Blckerr's Api
description: Blckerr's Api is a Api For My Mods!
body:
# **BLCKERR'S API**
Blckerr's api is used for (some of) my minecraft mods!
Blckerr's api adds compability with my mods!

### Mod Specially Addes:
- A painting
- more (unplanned)
## Mods Currently Using the Api:
- Private Mods
- Upcoming Mods / Mods
